scripts.build: tailwindcss -i web/assets/css/input.css -o web/assets/css/theme.css && esbuild web/assets/js/app.js --minify --outfile=web/assets/js/app.min.js && esbuild web/assets/js/admin.js --minify --outfile=web/assets/js/admin.min.js && esbuild web/assets/js/components/stepper.js --minify --outfile=web/assets/js/components/stepper.min.js && esbuild web/assets/js/components/contact.js --minify --outfile=web/assets/js/components/contact.min.js
